Become an AQA Sports Member

Join the elite of swimming and apnea in Algeria. As an official member, you will benefit from premium coaching, personalized progress reports, a unique QR code membership card, and exclusive unlockable rewards.

Join the Academy

Available Slots Preview

AQA Sports Advantages

🏊

Elite Coaching

Train with certified and highly experienced instructors.

📊

Personal Tech Reports

Improve your swimming technique with periodic reviews.

📱

Real-time Stats

Access your attendance records and scores directly from your mobile.

🏅

Gamified Progress

Gain XP and collect achievement badges throughout your journey.

About AQA

AQA Sports Academy is a premier sports facility dedicated to transforming beginners into confident athletes through elite coaching and personalized guidance.

Our mission: From zero to pro with science and technology.
